headline: Why Modine's $4 Billion AI Cooling Deal Could Be a Turning Point
summary: Modine lands a long-term AI data center cooling deal targeting $4B+ sales in 2027-29, backed by a $165M upfront payment to expand capacity.

raw.headline: Why Modine's $4 Billion AI Cooling Deal Could Be a Turning Point
